name: Asset Optimization
description: Reduce mesh complexity and optimize assets for XR deployment.

steps.title: Import Raw Mesh
steps.description: Load the reconstructed mesh into Blender.
instructions: Open Blender and import the OBJ/FBX file.
Inspect mesh for holes, non-manifold edges, and stray geometry.
Apply scale and recenter the origin.

steps.title: Decimate Mesh
steps.description: Reduce polygon count for XR performance.
instructions: Apply a Decimate modifier targeting 30-50% ratio.
Verify silhouette and detail are preserved.
Iterate ratio until performance target is met.

steps.title: Bake Textures
steps.description: Bake high-poly detail into optimized textures.
instructions: Unwrap UVs on the low-poly mesh.
Bake normal and diffuse maps from the high-poly source.
Export optimized mesh plus texture set.
